gui.item_lore.title: Lore
gui.item_lore.help.name: You can use same tags in both item names and lore.
gui.item_lore.help.color_intro: Use color tags to show text in one color.
gui.item_lore.help.gradient_intro: Use gradient tags to blend between two colors.
gui.item_lore.help.nesting_intro: Nested tags must close from inside to outside.
gui.item_lore.help.nesting_right_gradien: Also gradient should be the most inner tag if formatting tags are applied.
gui.item_lore.help.colors: Insert color uses the selected color, gradient uses Color 1 then Color 2.
gui.item_lore.help.sliders: Drag RGB sliders, use < and >, or paste/type 0-255 while a slider is focused.
gui.item_lore.help.slider_keys: Type or paste #rrggbb in the hex box to set the selected color.
